mapper.select:
select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.updated_at from users u left join departments d on d.id = u.dept_id and d.is_deleted = 0 where u.is_deleted = 0
and ( u.username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or u.real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by u.id desc

select u.id, u.username, u.real_name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.updated_at from users u left join departments d on d.id = u.dept_id and d.is_deleted = 0 where u.id = #{id} and u.is_deleted = 0

select u.id, u.username, u.password_hash, u.real_name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, u.status, u.last_login_time, u.updated_at from users u left join departments d on d.id = u.dept_id and d.is_deleted = 0 where u.username = #{username} and u.is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from users where dept_id = #{deptId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into users(username, password_hash, real_name, dept_id, status) values(#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{deptId}, #{status})
mapper.update: update users set status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
update users set real_name = #{realName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
update users set password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
update users set last_login_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select r.code from user_roles ur inner join roles r on ur.role_id = r.id where ur.user_id = #{userId}
select role_id from user_roles where user_id = #{userId} order by role_id asc
